info.name: Simsir - 09 Orders Module Tests
info.description: Orders module regression tests covering customer lifecycle, admin workflow transitions, role guards, and inventory commit/release effects using tokens from 01 User Role Token Setup.

item.name: GET /api/products/:slug - capture tracked demo inventory product

exec: pm.test('Tracked demo product response is valid', function () {
pm.test('At least one shipping address exists', function () { pm.expect(items.length).to.be.above(0); });
pm.test('At least one billing address exists', function () { pm.expect(items.length).to.be.above(0); });

item.name: GET /api/shipping-carriers - capture first public shipping service

exec: pm.test('Response includes free shipping threshold', function () { pm.expect(json.freeShippingThreshold).to.be.a('number'); });
pm.test('At least one public shipping service exists', function () { pm.expect(items.length).to.be.above(0); });
const selectable = items.filter(function (item) { return item.isSelectable !== false; });
const preferred = selectable.find(function (item) { return item.code === 'cash_on_delivery' || item.code === 'card_on_delivery'; }) || selectable[0];
pm.test('A selectable payment method exists', function () { pm.expect(preferred).to.exist; });

item.name: DELETE /api/cart - clear cart before order flow

exec: pm.test('Status code is one of [200, 201]', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Tracked product exists in cart', function () { pm.expect(item).to.exist; pm.expect(item.quantity).to.eql(1); });

item.name: GET /api/cart - cart should be empty after order create

exec: pm.test('Cart is empty after order creation', function () { pm.expect(json.items).to.be.an('array').with.length(0); });

item.name: POST /api/orders/:orderId/cancel - customer cancel should return 200 or 201

exec: pm.test('Status code is one of [200, 201]', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Cancelled order response is valid', function () {

item.name: GET /api/admin/products/:productId/inventory - inventory should restore baseline after cancel
GET /api/admin/products/:productId/inventory/transactions - reserve and release should be visible

exec: const reserveTx = (json.items || []).find(function (item) { return item.orderId === orderId && item.type === 'RESERVE'; });
const releaseTx = (json.items || []).find(function (item) { return item.orderId === orderId && item.type === 'RELEASE'; });
pm.test('Reserve and release transactions exist for the order', function () { pm.expect(reserveTx).to.exist; pm.expect(releaseTx).to.exist; });

item.name: GET /api/admin/products/:productId/inventory/reservations - released reservation should be visible

exec: pm.test('Released reservation exists for the order', function () { pm.expect(reservation).to.exist; pm.expect(reservation.status).to.eql('RELEASED'); });

item.name: 04 Admin Workflow - Transition Matrix + Deliver / Return / Restock
DELETE /api/cart - clear cart before Order A
POST /api/cart/items - add tracked product for Order A

exec: pm.test('Status code is one of [200, 201]', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Tracked product exists in cart for Order A', function () { pm.expect(item).to.exist; });
pm.test('Status code is one of [200, 201]', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Order A created in pending state', function () { pm.expect(json.orderStatus).to.eql('PENDING'); pm.expect(json.fulfillmentStatus).to.eql('PENDING'); });

item.name: ORDER_MANAGER - POST /api/admin/orders/:orderId/ready-for-shipment before confirm should return 409

exec: pm.test('Status code is one of [200, 201]', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: ORDER_MANAGER - POST /api/admin/orders/:orderId/hand-over before ready should return 409

exec: pm.test('Status code is one of [200, 201]', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Support staff can read admin order detail', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().id).to.eql(pm.environment.get('ordersModuleTestOrderAId')); });

item.name: ORDER_MANAGER - POST /api/admin/orders/:orderId/deliver before hand-over should return 409

exec: pm.test('Status code is one of [200, 201]', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

pm.test('Order A becomes HANDED_OVER and tracking is saved', function () { pm.expect(json.fulfillmentStatus).to.eql('HANDED_OVER'); pm.expect(json.shipmentSnapshot.trackingNumber).to.eql('PT-ORDER-A-001'); });
pm.test('Status code is one of [200, 201]', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Order A is delivered and completed', function () {

item.name: ORDER_MANAGER - POST /api/admin/orders/:orderId/hand-over Order B should return 200 or 201

exec: pm.test('Status code is one of [200, 201]', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: GET /api/admin/products/:productId/inventory - release effect should restore baseline after delivery failed

exec: pm.test('Inventory baseline is restored after delivery failed', function () { pm.expect(json.inventory.onHandQuantity).to.eql(Number(pm.environment.get('ordersModuleTestInitialOnHand'))); pm.expect(json.inventory.reservedQuantity).to.eql(Number(pm.environment.get('ordersModuleTestInitialReserved'))); });

item.name: 06 Admin Workflow - Admin Cancel Should Release Reservation
DELETE /api/cart - clear cart before Order C
POST /api/cart/items - add tracked product for Order C

exec: pm.test('Status code is one of [200, 201]', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Status code is one of [200, 201]', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Status code is one of [200, 201]', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: GET /api/admin/products/:productId/inventory - release effect should restore baseline after admin cancel

exec: pm.test('Inventory baseline is restored after admin cancel', function () { pm.expect(json.inventory.onHandQuantity).to.eql(Number(pm.environment.get('ordersModuleTestInitialOnHand'))); pm.expect(json.inventory.reservedQuantity).to.eql(Number(pm.environment.get('ordersModuleTestInitialReserved'))); });
